name: ATN International, Inc.
summary: ATN International, Inc. provides digital infrastructure and communications services in the US (western US and Alaska) and internationally (Bermuda, Cayman Islands, Guyana, US Virgin Islands). Services include fixed broadband, mobile telecommunications, carrier infrastructure services (tower leasing, fiber transport), and managed IT services. The company targets rural and remote markets, operating under brands such as Alaska Communications, Commnet, One Communications, Logic, and Brava, with over 12,200 fiber route miles and approximately 523,500 homes passed.

products.name: Fixed Telecommunications Services
products.description: High-speed broadband, enterprise data, voice, and video services to residential and business customers in rural and remote markets.

products.name: Carrier Telecommunications Services
products.description: Tower leasing, fiber transport, wholesale roaming, site maintenance, and international long-distance to other telecom providers.

products.name: Mobile Telecommunications Services
products.description: Wireless voice, messaging, and data services along with handsets to business and consumer customers.

products.name: Managed Services
products.description: IT solutions including network management, application support, and infrastructure services for enterprise and residential users.
